Protein names: Cobalamin biosynthesis protein CbiHC [Includes: Probable cobalt-factor III C(17)-methyltransferase (EC 2.1.1.-) (Cobalt-precorrin-3 methyltransferase) (Cobalt-precorrin-3 methylase); Cobalt-precorrin-8 methylmutase (EC 5.4.99.60) (Cobalt-precorrin isomerase)]
Organism: Archaeoglobus fulgidus (strain ATCC 49558 / DSM 4304 / JCM 9628 / NBRC 100126 / VC-16)
Sequence similarities: SIMILARITY: In the N-terminal section; belongs to the precorrin methyltransferase family. {ECO:0000305}.; SIMILARITY: In the C-terminal section; belongs to the CobH family. {ECO:0000305}.
Catalytic activity: CATALYTIC ACTIVITY: Reaction=Co(II)-factor III + S-adenosyl-L-methionine + H(+) = Co(II)-factor IV + S-adenosyl-L-homocysteine; Xref=Rhea:RHEA:45852, ChEBI:CHEBI:15378, ChEBI:CHEBI:57856, ChEBI:CHEBI:59789, ChEBI:CHEBI:73299, ChEBI:CHEBI:85471; CATALYTIC ACTIVITY: Reaction=Co-precorrin-8X = cob(II)yrinate; Xref=Rhea:RHEA:16209, ChEBI:CHEBI:58894, ChEBI:CHEBI:70792; EC=5.4.99.60;
Function [CC]: FUNCTION: Bifunctional enzyme with a methyltransferase domain that catalyzes the ring contraction and methylation of C-17 in cobalt-factor III to form cobalt-factor IV, and an isomerase domain that catalyzes the conversion of cobalt-precorrin-8 to cobyrinate. {ECO:0000250}.
